parameters.prompt:
={{ 'Analyze this news article for authenticity.

KNOWLEDGE BASE CONTEXT:
' + $items("Code — RAG Matcher").map(i => '- ' + (i.json.title || i.json["ARTICLE TITLE"]) + ' (Label: ' + (i.json.label || i.json.VERDICT) + ')').join('
') + '

Article: ' + $node["Webhook — Form Submission"].json.article_text + '

Respond in JSON:
{
  "verdict": "REAL/FAKE",
  "confidence": 0-100,
  "sentiment_score": 0-10,
  "sentiment_verdict": "NEUTRAL/EMOTIONAL/MANIPULATIVE",
  "reason1": "...",
  "reason2": "...",
  "reason3": "...",
  "similar_article": "..."
}' }}
